mapper.sql: id, student_no, name, gender, age, class_name, phone, email, address, score, status, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from student where student_no = #{studentNo} limit 1
select distinct class_name from student order by class_name asc
mapper.insert: insert into student (student_no, name, gender, age, class_name, phone, email, address, score, status, remark) values (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{className}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{score}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update student set student_no = #{studentNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, class_name = #{className}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, score = #{score}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
